# LCDNet: Deep Loop Closure Detection and Point Cloud Registration for LiDAR SLAM

- **Work ID:** `LPR-041`
- **Reviewed version:** `arxiv:2103.05056`

## Accepted structured facts

- **datasets:** KITTI, KITTI-360, Freiburg, MulRan for exploratory partial-overlap tests — `source_fact`; manual, p. 9–12, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
- **input_unit:** pair of single LiDAR scans containing x, y, z and intensity, voxelized over a 360-degree local grid — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–9, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
- **invariances:** learned rotation and translation robustness of keypoint features, supported by the training objective, augmentation and experiments rather than an analytic guarantee, partial-overlap robustness — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 5–10, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
- **representation:** PV-RCNN-derived voxel and point feature extractor, NetVLAD with context gating for the global descriptor, unbalanced-optimal-transport correspondence head, SVD or RANSAC 6-DoF pose estimation, optional ICP, LIO-SAM integration — `source_fact`; manual, p. 4–9, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
- **uses_learning:** yes — `source_fact`; manual, p. 1–17, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
- **uses_sequence:** no — `researcher_judgement`; manual, p. 1–17, § Abstract;III-IV. LCDNet;V-VI. Evaluation, Fig. 2-12;Table I-VIII
